prompt:
High-energy sports poster for Japan FIFA World Cup 2026. Young male football player walking forward confidently in the center, wearing a blue and white Japan national team tracksuit with white stripes, gray hoodie underneath, and blue crossbody bag. Jersey and tracksuit have number 10 and Japan crest. Holding a black duffel bag with 'JAPAN' in white letters in right hand. White and blue sneakers, chain necklace. A blue and white football at his feet on the left.

Background features bold brush stroke design in Japan flag colors: red, blue, and white. Large distressed blue text 'JAPAN' at top. Red brush text 'RISING STAR' on right, with smaller text 'FIFA World Cup 2026' underneath. Japan football association crest top right. Small crown icon and 'No.10' text on left side. Bottom left has 'SAMURAI BLUE' and tagline 'PRIDE. PASSION. JAPAN'. Bottom right has stylized signature and '#10'. Dynamic splatter and halftone effects, modern streetwear-meets-football aesthetic, vertical 2:3 poster layout, high detail, photorealistic with graphic design elements.
